leadOwned.reason: Mutable workflow state, packet publication and operation artifacts belong to the controller.
Controller-owned refreeze support for preserving compatible accepted tasks across plan adoption.
Controller-owned CLI flag for compatible accepted-task preservation during refreeze adoption.
Controller-owned regression coverage for compatible accepted-task preservation during refreeze adoption.
Controller-owned public workflow export for finalization.
Controller-owned next-action projection for FINAL_AUDIT finalization.

requirements.description: The terminal independent findings-first audit shall reconcile accepted tasks, write sets, local release-candidate inventory, local neutrality, conformance, adapter maturity, controller state, finalization capability and deferred production-promotion blockers against the immutable lock. It may report READY_FOR_FINALIZATION for the offline candidate only when no production-ready or verified-external claim is emitted and no unresolved MEDIUM, HIGH or BLOCKER finding remains. The controller shall then publish one canonical agent-run-final-proof.v1 artifact and transition the run to COMPLETE with productionPromotionClaimed false.

task.launchGate: LG-15 WS-14 accepted, every required task independently accepted and the controller pre-launch gate passed
